creator: spam@rm-rf.kiev.ua
text:
Converts ports from LDCONFIG_DIRS to USE_LDCONFIG.
Remove last instance of INSTALLS_SHLIB, since solution proposed to ports/123042.
This pr must be resolved before ports/146351.
